title: Clean vehicle engines and engine components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean vehicle engines and engine components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean vehicle engine and engine bay

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to clean vehicle engine and engine bay

elements.title: Wash and clean engine and components

pcs.text: Cleaning materials, tools and equipment are used according to manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Engine, components and engine bay are washed and cleaned according to workplace procedures and customer requirements2.3 Components are protected according to workplace instructions, and washing and cleaning are completed without causing damage to vehicle or engine2.4 Engine, components and engine bay are dried according to workplace procedures2.5 Engine and components are inspected and tested to ensure normal operation after the washing and drying process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cleaning materials, tools and equipment are used according to manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Engine, components and engine bay are washed and cleaned according to workplace procedures and customer requirements2.3 Components are protected according to workplace instructions, and washing and cleaning are completed without causing damage to vehicle or engine2.4 Engine, components and engine bay are dried according to workplace procedures2.5 Engine and components are inspected and tested to ensure normal operation after the washing and drying process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cleaning materials, tools and equipment are used according to manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Engine, components and engine bay are washed and cleaned according to workplace procedures and customer requirements2.3 Components are protected according to workplace instructions, and washing and cleaning are completed without causing damage to vehicle or engine2.4 Engine, components and engine bay are dried according to workplace procedures2.5 Engine and components are inspected and tested to ensure normal operation after the washing and drying process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Wash and clean engine and components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and engine is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and engine is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
